page_intro: Share the practical details behind your business so the strategy can be built around real customers, real offers, and the markets you want to win.
autosave_language_changed: Language changed. Your answers stayed saved.
section_a_subtitle: Tell me about your business — what you sell, how long you've been doing it, and where you operate.
section_b_subtitle: Now the most important part — who are you selling to, and what changes for them after they buy from you.
section_c_subtitle: Help me understand your competitive position and the questions your customers actually ask before buying.
section_d_subtitle: Help me understand your target buyers, export readiness, MENA countries, and proof assets.
section_e_subtitle: Separate the channels you already use from the platforms you want us to manage for MENA growth.
section_f_subtitle: What success looks like, whether paid ads are involved, and how ad spend will be handled.
section_g_subtitle: How new leads will be replied to after campaigns start generating conversations.
section_h_subtitle: The people I'll be working with — who's filling this form, and who I'll coordinate with daily.
q1_placeholder: Your public brand or company name
q_business_location_placeholder: City, country, or main service area
q3_label: What product or service do you sell?
q3_help: Include the product/service, buyer type, and what the customer receives.
q3_placeholder: Example: We sell ceramic tiles to importers and contractors; customers receive export-ready pallets, catalog support, and shipping documents.
q4_label: How long have you been in business?
q5_label: What's your typical price range per sale?
q6_label: Who is your ideal customer or buyer?
q6_help: Include who they are, where they are, what they care about, and how they usually find suppliers like yours.
q6_placeholder: Describe their location, lifestyle, buying behavior, and what they care about.
q7_label: What problem do you solve for them?
q7_help: Think about the moment they start looking for help.
q7_placeholder: What's the pain point, frustration, or gap that brings someone to you?
q8_label: What result does the buyer get after working with you?
q8_help: This becomes the promise behind the marketing, so concrete outcomes help.
q8_placeholder: What's better — time saved, money earned, problem gone, feeling different? Be specific.
q9_label: Why do buyers choose you instead of another supplier/company?
q9_help: Mention quality proof, price, speed, service, certifications, customization, trust, or anything buyers value.
q9_placeholder: What makes buyers choose you instead of another option?
q10_help: Example: price, quality, MOQ, shipping, certificates, payment safety, delivery time.
q10_placeholder: List the main worries buyers have before placing an order.
q11_help: Names, Instagram accounts, websites, or broad descriptions all work.
q11_placeholder: Names, websites, social accounts, or broad competitor categories.
q12_label: What makes you different or better?
q12_help: Avoid generic claims like 'quality'. Explain the proof behind the difference.
q12_placeholder: Be honest and specific. What can you honestly claim that others can't?
q13_label: Where are you with customer testimonials?
q13_opt_have_written: I have written testimonials I can share
q13_opt_have_unwritten: I have happy customers but no written testimonials yet
q13_opt_none_yet: I'm still building my client base
q13b_placeholder: Copy and paste your testimonials. Include the customer's name and context if possible.
q14_label: What questions do buyers usually ask before buying?
q14_help: These questions often become useful content, ads, FAQs, and sales messages.
q14_placeholder: List the questions people ask about price, timing, delivery, results, guarantees, or process.
q15_label: What type of buyers do you want to reach?
q16_label: What is your current MENA export status?
q16_opt_already_export_mena: We already export to the Middle East / MENA
q16_opt_export_not_strong_mena: We export, but not strongly in MENA yet
q16_opt_mena_inquiries: We receive some inquiries from MENA but no stable clients yet
q16_opt_do_not_export_mena: We do not export to MENA yet
q17_label: Minimum order quantity or typical order size
q17_help: Example: 1 container, 500 pieces, $5,000 minimum order, custom quotation.
q17_placeholder: Example: 1 container, 500 pieces, $5,000 minimum order, custom quotation.
q18_label: Which MENA countries do you want to target?
q19_label: What proof or sales assets are available?
q20_label: Which platforms or channels do you currently use?
q20_help: Include existing Chinese platforms, marketplace listings, social media, and websites. This does not mean we will manage them.
q21_label: Which platforms do you want us to manage or grow for the Middle East market?
q21_help: Chinese platforms are not assumed to be managed unless you choose them under Other.
q21_opt_not_sure: Not sure — I need your recommendation
q21_other_placeholder: Which other platform should we manage?
q22_label: Pick up to 3 words that describe your brand personality
q22_sublabel: Optional. Choose the ones that feel most true to how you want to be perceived.
q22_help: Pick the strongest three. Too many directions usually makes the brand harder to remember.
q23_label: What's your primary goal right now?
q23_help: Choose the one result that would make the next six months feel successful.
q23_opt_launch_product: Launch a new product or service
q24_label: Are you currently running paid ads?
q24b_label: Which ad platforms are you currently using?
q24b_placeholder: List the ad platforms you currently use.
q25_label: What's your monthly marketing / ad budget?
q25_help: An honest range helps shape the strategy. It does not lock you into a spend.
q26_opt_company: We already have an ad account and payment method ready
q26_opt_help: We need your help setting up the ad account and payment method
q26_opt_no_ads: We are not planning paid ads right now
q27_label: I understand the service fee and advertising spend are separate.
q28_label: When a lead comes from Facebook/Instagram/TikTok/LinkedIn, who will reply?
q28_opt_scripts: You prepare reply scripts, but our team replies
q29_label: How fast can your team usually reply to new leads?
f_submitter_heading: Your information (the person filling this form)
f_coordinator_subtitle: If the same as above, check the box below to auto-fill.
q_submitter_phone_placeholder: Phone, WhatsApp number, or preferred contact ID
q31_opt_one_coordinator: Me plus one coordinator or assistant
validation_email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation_at_least_1: Please select at least one option.
validation_summary_one: This section still needs 1 required answer before you continue.
validation_summary_many: This section still needs {n} required answers before you continue.
validation_jump: Take me to the first missing answer
submit_error: Something went wrong. Your answers are still saved here, so please try again.
network_error: Network error. Your answers are still saved here, so please check your connection and try again.
review_subtitle: Check your answers before sending. You can jump back to any section and make changes.
thank_you_title: Thank you — your intake is received.
thank_you_body: I'll review everything carefully and come back to you as soon as possible with a few clarifying questions before I start drafting your strategy. Great strategies start with great conversations — looking forward to ours.
